arts.ttl: Mathys Tel agrees to join Man Utd but Arsenal still keen
arts.sum: According to Sky Germany, Tel has now agreed to join Man Utd and concrete negotiations between the Red Devils and Bayern are taking place. Mathys Tel agrees to join Man Utd but Arsenal still keen

arts.ttl: £50m striker Arsenal are trying everything to sign has now decided to join Manchester United - journalist
Erling Haaland handed two-word jibe as Mikel Arteta Arsenal confrontation backfires
arts.sum: Former Arsenal star Mikael Silvestre has mocked Erling Haaland ahead of the clash with Manchester City in the Premier League this afternoon. He was caught on camera telling Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta to'stay humble,' in reference to his team's behaviour in the title race.

arts.ttl: Arsenal v Man City team news: Raya + Marmoush start, no Ederson
arts.sum: Kick-off is at 16:30 GMT The post Arsenal v Man City team news: Raya + Marmoush start, no Ederson appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: SHOCK Man Utd target, Arsenal Cunha BOMB, CRAZY Chelsea plan
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has provided some massive updates on the biggest transfer stories from around Europe, including the latest on Man Utd's pursuit of offensive reinforcements, Chelsea's 'crazy' plan for the final days of the window and the bombshell detail in Matheus Cunha's new contract. Speaking on his YouTube channel, Romano has confirmed that Aston Villa have reached an agreement to sign Man Utd outcast Marcus Rashford while he also provided an update on the Birmingham club's ongoing pursuit of Marco Asensio and Joao Felix.

arts.ttl: Arsenal submit £2.5m bid for 16-year-old goalkeeper as Mikel Arteta's 2026 plan revealed
arts.sum: Arsenal submit a £2.5m bid for 16-year-old Adana Demirspor goalkeeper Deniz Donmezer, according to the Turkish club's president.

arts.ttl: Swansea City transfer bulletin as Man City target left out of squad and Southampton man agrees move
arts.sum: Swansea City appear to be closing in on one deal but look likely to miss out on another target

arts.ttl: Arsenal man 'very close' to transfer agreement as Mikel Arteta makes January decision
arts.sum: Arsenal midfielder Jorginho is reportedly close to agreeing a pre-contract deal with Flamengo ahead of a free transfer to the Brazilian outfit this summer.

arts.ttl: Why Ederson is not in Man City squad vs Arsenal for crunch Premier League clash
arts.sum: Manchester City goalkeeper Ederson was missing as the Blues headed to Arsenal for a Premier League match

arts.ttl: Romano provides Mathys Tel update as Man United continue their push and Arsenal phone again
arts.sum: Mathys Tel may still yet leave Bayern Munich this January transfer window, according to Fabrizio Romano. The Italian reporter has conceded that remaining in Germany looks very possible for the teenager – but that two Premier League clubs continue to make their feelings clear.
